description: Develop and modify PLC and HMI programs for industrial automation systems, including inverter setup and parameter adjustment. Perform troubleshooting and debugging on control panels and field devices to ensure system reliability.
Responsible for troubleshooting and repairing electronic components such as sensors, lamps, and power supplies used in production machines.
Performed inspection, preventive maintenance, and replacement of spare parts to ensure production machines operated efficiently and reliably.
Assisted in modifying Human Machine Interface (HMI) systems, including monitor replacement and upgrading obsolete components with newer systems.
Conducted PLC wiring and electrical connections between control systems and production machines based on industrial standards.
Supported maintenance activities for industrial PCs and electronic devices used in manufacturing operations.
Prepared maintenance reports and documented machine repair activities to support operational monitoring.
